caption.text:
🇦🇪✨ YOUR EID MOMENT COULD WIN AED 1,000!

Here’s how to enter:
📸 Share your best Eid moment
📲 Post it on your socials
🤝 Tag @uae.weare & collaborate with us

The post with the highest views will be announced as the winner 👀

For queries or more information, send us a message ✨

#MyEidInUAE
